title: corymbia kombolgiensis
intro: Corymbia kombolgiensis, also known as Wollemi pine or Wollemi, is a rare and endangered tree species native to Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Corymbia kombolgiensis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and support immune function. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, capsules, and extracts, although its availability and use are highly regulated due to its conservation status.
